message:
The other day, I found myself rummaging through my closet looking for something completely unrelated, when I stumbled upon an old backpack. You know, the one I was convinced would be perfect for a go-bag? I opened it up, and what did I find? A half-eaten granola bar and a collection of mismatched socks! 😅 Talk about a preparedness fail! 

It hit me then how easy it is to forget about getting truly ready for unexpected situations. It’s not just about having stuff packed; it’s about making sure what’s in there actually makes sense! 

This little refresher helped me rethink our family’s emergency plans. Have you ever had a moment that made you realize you weren’t quite as ready as you thought?
